description_long: This jet ski features a sleek, angular body with a predominantly white exterior accented by blue and red highlights. The rear is equipped with four prominent jet exhausts, suggesting a high-powered propulsion system. The cockpit area is centrally located and appears to be enclosed with a dark, possibly tinted, canopy. The sides display vent-like structures and black rectangular markings, adding to its futuristic and aerodynamic appearance. The front narrows to a point, with additional black markings and a subtle intake vent. The overall design is streamlined, likely intended for high-speed water travel, and the materials suggest a combination of lightweight composites and metals.
description: A futuristic, white jet ski with blue and red accents, featuring four rear jet exhausts and a streamlined, angular body.
description_view_0: Rear view showing four blue jet exhausts and red-tipped engine housings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated body, side vents, and red engine housings.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, central cockpit, and black markings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible vents and engine details.
attribute_handlebar_design: Handlebar is not clearly visible, but implied to be integrated within the central cockpit area, likely with ergonomic grips and control panels.
attribute_seat_configuration: Single central seat, contoured and integrated into the body, with a dark color and streamlined shape.
